retrieved_result: Guidelines for Job Order Contracting (JOC) Guidelines for Job Order Contracting (JOC)Volume 4, Chapter 1, Section 1.3.7I. Introduction A job order contract (JOC) is a contract for a fixed term or maximum dollar value, whichever occurs first, in which a contractor is selected based on a competitive bid to perform various separate job orders i
